title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
abstract: Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experie
abstract_zh: 给你们安利个神器——Adobe的重装上阵版AI studio！**Feeling AI**它最大的魅力在于记得你每次创作的模样，再也不怕忘记上次的设计灵感了。写周报时突然没思路？调Bug时手忙脚乱找不到上次的做法？用上**Feeling AI**，就像有了个贴心的小助手，帮你找回所有创作的痕迹，效率瞬间UP UP！快来试试吧！
